phase.title: Portfolio integration baseline
phase.goal: Monorepo alignment, CLI docs, embed boundaries, preview uploads, route-installer cleanup for a host app that embeds RepoPlanner.

phase.title: Package host contract
phase.goal: Cleaner package-level host contract so other Next.js or Vite apps can import repo-planner/host with stable props.

phase.title: Live cockpit
phase.goal: Real cockpit body, Pack vs Live modes, shared bundle plumbing, dashboard chrome — one data contract for file tree and inspector.

phase.title: Built-in planning-pack generation
phase.goal: Ship builtin-packs.json (or equivalent) from repo-owned planning files so static sites can demo without a backend.

phase.title: Workflow loop
phase.goal: Sprint-aware snapshot scoring, kickoff scaffolding, done gates, ownership guidance — same engine for CLI and UI.

phase.title: Structured cockpit views
phase.goal: Form-based editing where schema is known, badges, autosave in pack mode, immutable ids, host policy flags.

phase.title: GAD migration and reference site
phase.goal: Skills and CLI narrative move toward Get Anything Done; this repository stays a file-format and UI reference; landing site documents parsing, packs, and read-only cockpit behavior.
